beer.beer_description:
Built on a creamy oat base with lactose in the kettle and fermented with our house hazy yeast, this Oat Cream IPA is designed to pay out big.
Waiti and Nelson kick things off in the whirlpool before a hefty dry hop of Superdelic, Motueka and Peacharine floods the glass with tropical fruit, citrus and soft stone fruit vibes. We then doubled down with cold-pressed Waiti hop juice from Freestyle Hops, pushing the aroma and juice factor even further.

items.badge_description: Congrats, you've unlocked the World Pint 2026: Australia badge! Keep checking in beers to score badges from the other 47 countries competing in the world's biggest football competition. Keep up to date on future badges by following us on social @untappd!

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 420 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 85!

Hiking, fishing, swimming - there are so many wonderful things to do while you enjoy the great outdoors. Even beer is better when surrounded by the beauty of nature. That's 110 different venues categorized as Great Outdoors. Visit 5 more for Level 23!

Ahhh...the great outdoors. Fresh air, blue skies, becoming one with nature. And a beer. Can your day get any better? That’s 30 different venues with the category of Park. Check-in to 5 more to get to Level 7.

items.checkin_comment: Aromatic and flavoursome brew with a silky, thick texture. I’m loving the Clean Fusion, it ads so much depth and vibrancy. Banana chips, peach ‘leather’, devilled eggs, young grass and intense lupulin with bitterness contained. Superb as always

items.checkin_comment: Nice clean hazy notes; a good sulfury mangone note like some Banks hazies. Lacks the huge mouthfeel and sweet balance of a top oat cream, but still quite nice
